tags.name: West Hunt Club Road
tags.note: Why is hunt climb tagged an expressway? expressway tag refers to a limited access divided carriageway with unusually high speeds for a city road and no driveway or side street access, which is what the non-straod section of hunt club is. AKA motorroad.
